package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for custom_validator_registration_inside_handler: Per-request validator registration instead of startup-time validator wiring.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule022NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule022NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule022NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario022Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule022NegativeService, input Rule022NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
